input.command: curl -s "https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json" | python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); print('Total tokens:', len(data['tokens'])); print('Chain IDs:', set(t['chainId'] for t in data['tokens'][:100]))"
input.description: Check available chains in CoinGecko list
